name: sort-prices

metadata.name: sort-prices
metadata.summary: A library to sort prices from low to high for Django or other Python applications.

documentation:
# Sort Prices

A Python library to sort prices from low to high for Django or any Python application.

## Installation

```bash
pip install sort_prices

functions.name: sort_prices.sorter.sort_prices_low_to_high
documentation:
Sort a list of prices in ascending order.

Args:
    prices (list): A list of numeric values representing prices.

Returns:
    list: Sorted list of prices from low to high.
